content:
```diff
+ # Medieval Pixel Art Color Palette
+
+ A unified color palette with 8 color ramps, each containing 5 shades from darkest shadow to highlight.
+
+ ## Stone (Grays)
+ - Shadow: #2F2F2F
+ - Dark: #595959
+ - Mid: #8C8C8C
+ - Light: #BFBFBF
+ - Highlight: #E6E6E6
+
+ ## Wood (Browns)
+ - Shadow: #3B1F0B
+ - Dark: #6A3E17
+ - Mid: #A56A2A
+ - Light: #D9A55B
+ - Highlight: #F0C986
+
+ ## Gold (Yellows)
+ - Shadow: #4B3B00
+ - Dark: #7A6A0A
+ - Mid: #BFA70F
+ - Light: #F3D94E
+ - Highlight: #FFF4A3
+
+ ## Crimson (Reds)
+ - Shadow: #4A0E0E
+ - Dark: #7B1B1B
+ - Mid: #B72E2E
+ - Light: #E67373
+ - Highlight: #F9BABA
+
+ ## Royal Blue (Blues)
+ - Shadow: #0B1F3B
+ - Dark: #17406A
+ - Mid: #2A6ABF
+ - Light: #5B93E6
+ - Highlight: #A3C0FF
+
+ ## Forest Green (Greens)
+ - Shadow: #0B3B1F
+ - Dark: #176A40
+ - Mid: #2ABF6A
+ - Light: #5BE699
+ - Highlight: #A3FFD1
+
+ ## Iron (Dark Grays)
+ - Shadow: #1A1A1A
+ - Dark: #3D3D3D
+ - Mid: #6B6B6B
+ - Light: #9E9E9E
+ - Highlight: #CCCCCC
+
+ ## Parchment (Warm Whites)
+ - Shadow: #7A6A4F
+ - Dark: #A58F6B
+ - Mid: #D9C9A5
+ - Light: #F0E6C9
+ - Highlight: #FFF9E6
```
